title: Simple Voice Chat Group Player Names
description: NeoForge port of the popular Simple Voice Chat Group Player Names mod that displays player names next to group player heads in the HUD.
body:
# Simple Voice Chat Group Player Names (NeoForge Port)

![HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51a7c04ea57cb3410fbbe1b2fed4637ea8e9fc78.png)

Display player names next to group icons in the Simple Voice Chat HUD.

## Features

- **Player Names in HUD**: See who's in your voice chat group at a glance
- **Configurable Transparency**: Different opacity for talking/silent players
- **Show Only When Talking**: Optional - display names only for active speakers
- **Text Outline**: Better visibility against any background
- **Native Config Menu**: Easy setup through NeoForge's built-in config
- **Multi-Language**: English, German, Russian

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.10
- NeoForge 21.10.47-beta+
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat) 2.6.6+

## Credits

- Original mod by [Greenman999](https://github.com/Greeenman999/simple-voice-chat-group-player-names)
- NeoForge port by [Smallinger](https://github.com/Smallinger/simple-voice-chat-group-player-names)

## Support

[Report Issues](https://github.com/smallinger/simple-voice-chat-group-player-names/issues) | [Support on Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/smallinger)
